pages.text: These hills are full of life. Several winged creatures, friendly and hostile, roam around. Large birds known as $(thing)moa$() are of note; perhaps if I find an egg I can tame one.

There is a variety of lush vegetation as well, $(thing)cloudsbluff$() and $(thing)koji mold$() are everywhere, as are unique flowers (some alive and quite nasty) and $(thing)skyroot trees$(). The berries are a good source of food while on the move.$(br)The exposed stone shows traces of zanite and crystalized beaming amber.

A shiny gem which is a fundamental component of $(l:innovation/metallurgy/electrum)aetherial electrum$() and other useful things.$(br)From what I can gather, this is some sort of fossilized  resin from those golden trees, and I truly mean the 'gold' part. Perhaps there are some processing opportunities in here.
